text:
Once upon a time, there was a shy chetnik bird who lived on a tiny island. She had long, elegant feathers that shimmered like emeralds. Every day she would perch on an ancient olive tree at the edge of the shore. She didn't talk much; her nest wasn't big enough for stories. One day, a gentle sea lion told her about a magical gourd that could fly. That night, she dreamed of a cloud-fwing bird that whispered secrets. The next morning, she found an old gourd under an ancient olive tree. Giggling like a little girl, she filled it with laughter.

A flock of starlings heard her laughter. They followed the gourd higher and higher, into the clouds. There they met a wise old eagle who promised them adventures everywhere they flew. They took flights so high they thought the sky went on forever. Every night after that, the laughter-filled gourd flew with them.
